topics.title: Sports and Technology Discussion

topics.summary: The studio discusses Howard TV marketing, Sirius XM's growth in the satellite radio market, and various humorous anecdotes involving personal experiences and media clips.

topics.title: Chinchilla Sales and Football Picks

topics.summary: The show features a promotional segment for an adult film and DVD, followed by a discussion regarding football picks and the selection of a contestant for a dating game.

topics.summary: The studio reviews a series of photographs while discussing the selection of women for an upcoming segment before transitioning to a break to prepare for an interview with Owen Lefebvre.

topics.title: Nick Carter Discusses Memoir on Scandalous Divorce
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Nick Carter regarding his new book about his marriage to a teacher who was arrested for an inappropriate relationship with a student.

topics.title: Interview with Models Jen and Courtney
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview two models, one a porn star and the other a calendar model, while discussing their careers and engaging in interactive segments involving a wheel of farts.

topics.title: Guest Appearance and Promotional Plug
topics.summary: The studio features guest Jen Houston as she participates in a series of games, including the "wheel of farts," while promoting her 2007 calendar and DVD.

topics.title: Will the Farter and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features a segment with Will the Farter and guests Courtney Combs and Jen Houston, followed by discussions regarding sports figures and wrestling.

topics.title: Chris Canyon's Wrestling Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with former wrestler Chris Canyon regarding his tenure in the WWE, his experience coming out as gay, his struggles with mental illness, and his transition to independent wrestling.

topics.title: Wrestling and Sports Betting
topics.summary: The studio features a guest wrestler who discusses his career, the challenges of being an out athlete in major sports, and makes a wager regarding upcoming baseball playoffs.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio discusses the growth of Sirius satellite radio, a segment on celebrity gossip with Mike Walker, and various entertainment news stories.

topics.title: Current Events and Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including local news stories about a teacher facing charges, reports on international events in Colombia and Iraq, celebrity updates regarding Madonna and Jimmy Buffett, and upcoming segments for the wrap-up show.

topics.title: Legal and Celebrity News Roundup
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including legal rulings on religious education, celebrity health updates for Oprah Winfrey and Cheryl Crow, upcoming film releases, and political fallout regarding congressional ethics.
